structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Cold Duct Airflow Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature exceeds room temperature, the setpoint is capped at the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling Loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. 1. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. 1. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct supply airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Airflow Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is set to the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. Hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Hot Duct Airflow Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output resets the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. The cooling damper controls to maintain the sum of measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint. If hot-deck supply air temperature is less than room temperature, the hot duct airflow setpoint is capped at the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating-loop output resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. Hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. Cooling damper controls to maintain sum of measured inlet airflows at minimum endpoint. If hot-deck supply air temperature < room temperature, active hot duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint. 1. If hot-deck supply air temperature from air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the heating-loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to the heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. The cooling damper shall be controlled to maintain the sum of the measured inlet airflows at the minimum endpoint. 1. If hot-deck supply air temperature from air handler is less than room temperature, the active hot duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – 70% Threshold
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – 50% Threshold
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.

structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zones with Importance-Multiplier 0
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan serving zone is OFF AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes while fan is OFF
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes AND fan serving damper is proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning override activated
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches interlock to system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, force cooling damper full closed/open, force heating damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.12.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.12.4).
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with mixing control and inlet airflow sensors
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Table 5.12.4 defines the cooling maximum, minimum, and heating maximum endpoints for each Zone Group mode: Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling maximum = Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Minimum = Vmin* in Occupied; 0 in all other modes. Heating maximum = Vheat-max in Occupied, Warmup, Setback; 0 in Cooldown, Setup, Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.12.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.12.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Endpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
